title: Confusion Of Face.
content:
God then confounds man's face when He not bears
    The vows of those who are petitioners.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Confusion Of Face.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
